assertion_results.text: The review comment about transaction wrapping (id 30001) is classified as a code change request and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30001.md states '## Classification: code change request'. report.md shows comment 30001 with Classification 'Code change request' and Action 'Sub-task created'. subtask-30001.md exists with full sub-task content.

assertion_results.text: The review comment about adding an index (id 30002) is classified as a code change request (or upgraded suggestion) and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md states '## Classification: code change request'. report.md shows comment 30002 with Classification 'Code change request' and Action 'Sub-task created'. subtask-30002.md exists with full sub-task content.

assertion_results.text: The nit comment about context message (id 30003) is classified as nit and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30003.md states '## Classification: nit'. report.md shows comment 30003 with Classification 'Nit' and Action 'No sub-task'. No subtask-30003.md file exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: The question comment about GET behavior (id 30004) is classified as question and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30004.md states '## Classification: question'. report.md shows comment 30004 with Classification 'Question' and Action 'No sub-task'. No subtask-30004.md file exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description follows the task-description-template.md format: contains Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains sections: '## Repository' (trustify-backend), '## Description', '## Files to Modify', '## Implementation Notes', '## Acceptance Criteria'. subtask-30002.md contains the same sections: '## Repository' (trustify-backend), '## Description', '## Files to Modify', '## Implementation Notes', '## Acceptance Criteria'.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Target PR section with the PR URL https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744 (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Target PR' followed by 'https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'. subtask-30002.md contains '## Target PR' followed by 'https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744'.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Review Context section with the original review comment text (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Review Context' with the full original comment text: 'The `soft_delete` method should run all three UPDATE statements inside a single database transaction...'. subtask-30002.md contains '## Review Context' with the full original comment text: 'The migration should also add an index on `deleted_at` for the sbom table...'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, creates sub-task descriptions, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md), sub-task descriptions (subtask-30001.md, subtask-30002.md), and a report (report.md). No code files (.rs, .toml, etc.) are present in the outputs. The report identifies issues (e.g., missing get.rs changes) but does not modify any source files.

assertion_results.text: The skill reads and processes all PR review comments before generating findings (constraint 1.10)
assertion_results.evidence: All four review comments (30001, 30002, 30003, 30004) have individual classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md). The report.md Review Comment Summary table lists all four comments with their classifications and actions, confirming all were processed.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with '### Overall: FAIL' and identifies issues that 'require attention before this PR can be merged'. There is no mention of merging, auto-merge, or any merge action taken. The report explicitly states the PR should not be merged in its current state.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/sbom_delete.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14: '| Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | New test file `tests/api/sbom_delete.rs` with 5 test functions; no modified or deleted test files |'

assertion_results.text: Convention upgrade eligibility is evaluated for review comment 30002 (index suggestion) — the review classification output (review-30002.md) or the report's Style/Conventions analysis explains whether the suggestion matches a documented or demonstrated project convention
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md classifies comment 30002 directly as 'code change request' based on the reviewer's directive language ('should also add') without evaluating convention upgrade eligibility. The report's Root-Cause Analysis for comment 30002 mentions 'No CONVENTIONS.md exists in the repository documenting index creation patterns' and classifies it as a 'convention gap', but this is root-cause analysis, not convention upgrade eligibility evaluation. There is no explicit evaluation of whether the index suggestion matches a documented or demonstrated project convention for the purpose of upgrade eligibility from suggestion to code change request.

assertion_results.text: Review comment 30002 (index suggestion) results in a sub-task regardless of classification path — whether classified directly as code change request based on reviewer language, or upgraded from suggestion via convention analysis
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md classifies comment 30002 as 'code change request'. report.md shows comment 30002 with Action 'Sub-task created'. subtask-30002.md exists with complete sub-task description including Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Review Context, and Target PR sections.
